name: Eric W. Gerstenberg
currentRole: President and Chief Operating Officer, Clean Harbors, Inc
formerRole: Executive Vice President and Chief Operating Officer, Clean Harbors, Inc
connectionToCompany: Eric Gerstenberg served as EVP and COO at Clean Harbors for many years, reporting directly to Alan McKim and overseeing day-to-day operations before transitioning roles internally
sourceNote: Named in Clean Harbors SEC proxy filings and press releases as a senior executive

name: James M. Rutledge
formerRole: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, Clean Harbors, Inc
connectionToCompany: James Rutledge served as EVP and CFO at Clean Harbors, working closely with Alan McKim on financial strategy and investor relations
sourceNote: Named in Clean Harbors SEC filings as a named executive officer
